issues.element_name: Primary CTA - Get Lifetime Access For Only $49
issues.suggested_text_fix: Yes! Give Me Lifetime Access For Just $49 → Lock In My Price Before It Rises

issues.element_name: Navigation CTA - Get Access (Top Bar)
issues.suggested_text_fix: Replace the generic '→ Get Access' with a benefit-driven label like 'Get Blueprints – $49' to reduce ambiguity and decision fatigue. Ensure only ONE CTA style is present in the nav bar.

issues.element_name: Hero Headline - Creator Blueprints
issues.suggested_text_fix: The #1 Growth System for Creators: Proven Blueprints to Grow Your Audience, Build Authority, and Monetize Your Knowledge — Fast

issues.element_name: Hero Subheadline
issues.suggested_text_fix: Stop guessing what to do next. Get instant access to an ever-growing library of step-by-step frameworks and printable blueprints — covering content creation, audience growth, copywriting, offer building, and sales automation — so you can scale your personal brand with total clarity.

issues.element_name: Social Proof Bar - Over 8,000 Happy Customers
issues.suggested_text_fix: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Trusted by 8,000+ Creators & Business Owners — [Add 2–3 short named testimonials with measurable results directly below this bar, e.g., 'I grew from 0 to 12k followers in 60 days using the Hook Formulas Blueprint – Sarah M.']

issues.element_name: Section Headline - Formulas and Frameworks Based On Over a Decade of Testing
issues.suggested_text_fix: Battle-Tested Over 10+ Years & 8,000+ Customers: The Exact Frameworks I Used to Build a 6-Figure Creator Business From Scratch

issues.element_name: Section Subheadline - Get Total Clarity On How to Scale Your Personal Brand
issues.suggested_text_fix: Most creators stay stuck because they lack a clear system. Creator Blueprints gives you the exact playbooks, formulas, and step-by-step frameworks to finally scale — without the overwhelm. If you can follow a blueprint, you can grow your brand.

issues.element_name: Feature Bullet - Detailed Gameplans For Every Aspect of Your Business
issues.suggested_text_fix: ✅ Done-For-You Gameplans: Get a clear action plan for Strategy, Content, Copywriting, Offer Creation, Sales Automation & Self-Mastery — so you always know exactly what to do next.

issues.element_name: Feature Bullet - All Current AND Future Frameworks Included
issues.suggested_text_fix: 🔒 Lifetime Access — Pay Once, Get Everything Forever: All current blueprints plus every new framework added going forward. The price increases as more content is added — lock in $49 today.

issues.element_name: Feature Bullet - Dozens of Business Growth Systems Organized Into a Searchable Database
issues.suggested_text_fix: 🗂️ Searchable Blueprint Database + Miro Board: Instantly find the exact framework you need. No more hunting through folders — new blueprints added every month, all organized for fast action.

issues.element_name: Feature Bullet - Includes Access to Blueprints FM Private Podcast
issues.suggested_text_fix: 🎙️ BONUS: Blueprints FM Private Podcast — Get audio breakdowns of every blueprint so you can learn on the go, PLUS a free starter course to hit the ground running immediately.

issues.element_name: CTA Section - Get Lifetime Access For Only $49 (Mid-Page)
issues.suggested_text_fix: Add urgency and risk-reversal directly below this CTA: '✅ 30-Day Money-Back Guarantee — If you don't find at least one blueprint that transforms your business, I'll refund every penny. No questions asked.' Also include a price-anchoring statement: 'One framework could easily make you 100x your investment.'

issues.element_name: Bundle Preview Section Headline - Here Are Just Some of the Many Blueprints Included
issues.suggested_text_fix: Here's a Taste of What's Inside Your Creator Blueprints Library (50+ Frameworks & Growing): Each blueprint is designed to give you an immediate, actionable win.

issues.element_name: Blueprint Preview - 101 Fill-in-the-Blank Hook Formulas
issues.suggested_text_fix: 101 Fill-in-the-Blank Hook Formulas — Instantly capture attention and force the algorithm to push your content to thousands of new people. Just fill in the blanks and post.

issues.element_name: Blueprint Preview - 77 Idea Generation Writing Prompts
issues.suggested_text_fix: 77 Idea Generation Prompts for Creators — Never stare at a blank screen again. Pull from 77 ready-to-use content ideas engineered to resonate with your audience and drive engagement.

issues.element_name: Blueprint Preview - 21 Copywriting Prompts For Thought Leaders
issues.suggested_text_fix: 21 Copywriting Prompts for Thought Leaders — Stand out with more persuasive, emotionally compelling content that positions you as the go-to authority in your niche.

issues.element_name: Missing: Named Testimonials with Measurable Outcomes
issues.suggested_text_fix: Add 3–5 specific, named testimonials with measurable results directly after the social proof bar, e.g.: '"Using the Content System Blueprint, I went from posting twice a week with 200 views to 3 viral posts in 30 days with 40k+ impressions." — Jake T., Business Coach, Austin TX.' Include a profile photo for each to maximize credibility.

issues.element_name: Missing: FAQ / Objection-Handling Section
issues.suggested_text_fix: Add a dedicated FAQ section above the final CTA to address key objections: 'Is this for beginners or advanced creators?' / 'How is this different from a course?' / 'Will new blueprints cost extra?' / 'What if I'm not satisfied?' / 'How do I access the blueprints?' Removing these objections silently increases conversion rate significantly.

issues.element_name: Missing: Personal Introduction / Creator Bio with Credibility Markers
issues.suggested_text_fix: Add a dedicated 'About the Creator' section with a clear headshot, name, and 3–4 credibility proof points (e.g., '10+ years in digital marketing', 'helped 8,000+ creators', 'generated $X in revenue using these exact systems'). Buyers need to trust WHO is teaching before they invest, even at a low price point.

issues.element_name: Missing: Explicit Guarantee / Risk Reversal Statement
issues.suggested_text_fix: Add a boldly styled guarantee block near every CTA: '🛡️ 30-Day No-Questions-Asked Money-Back Guarantee: Try every single blueprint for a full 30 days. If you don't see the value, email us and we'll refund you immediately — no hoops, no hassle. You have zero risk.' This alone can increase conversions by 15–30% at this price point.
